TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Li-aow-na-tow.Ta-wen-si (Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Leonardo da Vinci,śĄŹÁāļ" (Leonardo di ser Piero da Vinci, "), ci Li-aw-na-to.Ta-wen-si "I-tali- a kamu" Leonardo da Vinci imi uyni "Wen-si-cen a Li-aw-na-to, ci Zu-lye-li i 1451 a micaan 4 a bilad 15 a demiad katukuh 1519 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 2 ademiad", ci Ta-ben-ci han aca, hamin u ngangan ci Li-aw-na-to.Ti.Say-al.Pi-ye-low.Ta-en-si han "Leonardo di ser Piero da Vinci, uimi niza "Wen-si-cen-pi-ye-low u wawa niza ci Li-aw-na-to", I-tali nu nalimaan misulitay tu cudad u cumelakay a mihcaan Bow-low-lun-s masakaputay mapulungan a kanatal nu mitesekay ku tineng, i pikulit, dadiw misangay, miasipay, pinaay, micici'ay, migingkiway tu mauzipay, aadupan, mulangaway, migingkiw tu tahakay, migingkiw tu demiad, migingkiw tu lala'ay migikiway tu hekalay kakitizaan, migingkiw tu tahak, migikiway tu likat, migingkiway tu icelang, misabaluhay misanga', misangaay patizengay a kawaw hatini kayadah, u liwliw nu pienengan mahapinang amin ku mapahezekay a nisanga'an. ". ciniza mala u cumelakay nu nalimaan a misulitay tu cudad nu situngusay misitay tu lalangawan, i laylay u singanganay nu kucungay, aci Mi-kay-lang-ci-low atu ci La-piy-al malecad singanga ttu tulu nu matinengay cumelak nu nalimaan a misulitan. adidi'ay niyula a bunac 3000 u pikineng ci Ta-wen-sian a nipangangan han "ci Li-aw-na-to" śĆČÁÖßŤóĚŤ°ďŚŹ≤Ś≠łŤÄÖśĶ∑ŚÄę¬∑Śä†Śĺ∑Áīć(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Helen Gardner )ÁöĄŤ™™ś≥ē, . duduc tu nalimaan migingkiway tu laylay ci Hay-lun.Cya-te-na "kamu nu A-me-lika, Helen Gardner " han. tu kamu, u nabalucu'an niza katukuh tu i cayay ka izaway a liwliw atu katesek ka kailabu, saca "u nizateng niza atu tademaw mzahiza u malakuitaytu nu tademawan, ciniza u kaliyuhan u cayay ku cacapian aca. Marco Rosci patahkal kanahatu ayza yadah tu pakayniay ci Li-aw-na-to.Ta-wen-si a pizayeng, u piazih niza tu kitakit tatenga' maka nuyaanay a tineng tatungus tu nizatengan caay ku kakaliyuhan, micukaymas ciniza tu natenengan a misakaku tu nanimaan a kawaw itawya a mihcaan u micidekay tu. Ta-wen-si u kumuing ci Se-pi-ye-low.Ta-wen-si atu malukay a tatayna ci Ka-te-lin-na caay ka siacawa sibucud tu tatayna a wawaan, ciniza i I-ta-li-bow-low-lun-s-ancavay Wen-si a kaakitizaan lecuhan balaki. ci Li-aw-na-to naadidi' i singanganay tu Bow-low-lun-s nu mitesekay nu mikuliay ci An-te-lye.Te-al.Wilow-ci-aw a pikulitan amipalangaw. u saayawaya nikauzip a kawaw niza u sakay Miz-lan a Lu-to-wiy-ke.S-bu-al-ca ku kawaw. zikuz i Low-ma,Pow-lung-na atu Wiy-ni-s misakakawwa ciniza, i Ba-lan-sow-wa cacay a lasubu a mihcaan u pabeliay cinizaan a Ba-kow a luma'an mauzip tu sazikuzay tu a nikauzip a mihcaan. Ta-wen-si i kasumamadan atu ayzaay u angangan u mikulitay han a pangangan, u nikulitan nisulitan niza a kasingangan, "Mong-na-li-sa" tada u singanganay u hina matudungay tu nikulita a tademaw. "sazikuzaya nikalabi" nasa hamin nu kasa mihcaanay u sayadahay niliyawan a mitudung mikulit tu nu kiwkay, uyza dada' ni Mi-kay-lang-ci-low "misanga' tu Ye-tang" a singangan taneng tu salungan. Li-aw-na-to a nikulitan "Wiy-te-lu-wiy a tademaw" nasaca mahiza u lalangawan, namapatudung i canacanan a tuudadn, mahizaay u Ow a kalisiw sapasubana' tu cudad atu zikucan. u nikulitan niza izaw ku 15 a tatipelukan ku masubeliday, sikasa caay ka yadah, zayhan sa lalid sa ciniza caay ka putut, tatultultul sa miyung tu baluhay a nalimaan a tineng tu satebuc atu mikulit ciniza caay kadadawa. anu mahicahica, u nisanga'an niza a tuud, uyza pasu tu kalamkam tu nisulitan niza, ke-sey bacu a pipaheci atu pakayniay nisabacuan tu nu limaay a nisulitan niza, mala u malecaday a zidayan uyza dada' ci Mi-kay-lang-ci-low kya taneng a patahkal a u tatengilan, saakay iluciluc a kucungay a tabaki ku nikalilid tu kucungay.
S.PHON: r~…ĺi-aow-na-tow.ta-w…ôn-si (****:r~…ĺ…ôonardo da *in ¶i,**" (r~…ĺ…ôonardo di s…ôr pi…ôro da *in ¶i, "), ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to.ta-w…ôn-si "i-tar~…ĺi- a kamu" r~…ĺ…ôonardo da *in ¶i imi ujni "w…ôn-si- ¶…ôn a r~…ĺi-aw-na-to, ¶i zu-r~…ĺj…ô-r~…ĺi i **** a mi ¶aan * a bir~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * ad…ômiad", ¶i ta-b…ôn- ¶i ńßan a ¶a, ńßamin u ŇčaŇčan ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to.ti.saj-ar~…ĺ.pi-j…ô-r~…ĺow.ta-…ôn-si ńßan "r~…ĺ…ôonardo di s…ôr pi…ôro da *in ¶i, uimi niza "w…ôn-si- ¶…ôn-pi-j…ô-r~…ĺow u wawa niza ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to", i-tar~…ĺi nu nar~…ĺimaan misur~…ĺitaj tu ¶udad u ¶um…ôr~…ĺakaj a mińß ¶aan bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s masakaputaj mapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ nu mit…ôs…ôkaj ku tin…ôŇč, i pikur~…ĺit, dadiw misaŇčaj, miasipaj, pinaaj, mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °aj, migiŇčkiwaj tu mauzipaj, aadupan, mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, migiŇčkiw tu tańßakaj, migiŇčkiw tu d…ômiad, migiŇčkiw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj migikiwaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj kakitizaan, migiŇčkiw tu tańßak, migikiwaj tu r~…ĺikat, migiŇčkiwaj tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, misabar~…ĺuńßaj misaŇča Ē~ °, misaŇčaaj patiz…ôŇčaj a kawaw ńßatini kajadańß, u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu pi…ôn…ôŇčan mańßapinaŇč amin ku mapańß…ôz…ôkaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an. ". ¶iniza mar~…ĺa u ¶um…ôr~…ĺakaj nu nar~…ĺimaan a misur~…ĺitaj tu ¶udad nu situŇčusaj misitaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, i r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj u siŇčaŇčanaj nu ku ¶uŇčaj, a ¶i mi-kaj-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶i-r~…ĺow atu ¶i r~…ĺa-pij-ar~…ĺ mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad siŇčaŇča ttu tur~…ĺu nu matin…ôŇčaj ¶um…ôr~…ĺak nu nar~…ĺimaan a misur~…ĺitan. adidi Ē~ °aj nijur~…ĺa a buna ¶ **** u pikin…ôŇč ¶i ta-w…ôn-sian a nipaŇčaŇčan ńßan " ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to" *************(**:ńß…ôr~…ĺ…ôn gardn…ôr )***, . dudu ¶ tu nar~…ĺimaan migiŇčkiwaj tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺun. ¶ja-t…ô-na "kamu nu a-m…ô-r~…ĺika, ńß…ôr~…ĺ…ôn gardn…ôr " ńßan. tu kamu, u nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an niza katukuńß tu i ¶ajaj ka izawaj a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw atu kat…ôs…ôk ka kair~…ĺabu, sa ¶a "u nizat…ôŇč niza atu tad…ômaw mzańßiza u mar~…ĺakuitajtu nu tad…ômawan, ¶iniza u kar~…ĺijuńßan u ¶ajaj ku ¶a ¶apian a ¶a. mar ¶o *os ¶i patańßkar~…ĺ kanańßatu ajza jadańß tu pakajniaj ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to.ta-w…ôn-si a pizaj…ôŇč, u piazińß niza tu kitakit tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° maka nujaanaj a tin…ôŇč tatuŇčus tu nizat…ôŇčan ¶aaj ku kakar~…ĺijuńßan, mi ¶ukajmas ¶iniza tu nat…ôn…ôŇčan a misakaku tu nanimaan a kawaw itawja a mińß ¶aan u mi ¶id…ôkaj tu. ta-w…ôn-si u kumuiŇč ¶i s…ô-pi-j…ô-r~…ĺow.ta-w…ôn-si atu mar~…ĺukaj a tatajna ¶i ka-t…ô-r~…ĺin-na ¶aaj ka sia ¶awa sibu ¶ud tu tatajna a wawaan, ¶iniza i i-ta-r~…ĺi-bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s-an ¶a*aj w…ôn-si a kaakitizaan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan bar~…ĺaki. ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to naadidi Ē~ ° i siŇčaŇčanaj tu bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s nu mit…ôs…ôkaj nu mikur~…ĺiaj ¶i an-t…ô-r~…ĺj…ô.t…ô-ar~…ĺ.wir~…ĺow- ¶i-aw a pikur~…ĺitan amipar~…ĺaŇčaw. u saajawaja nikauzip a kawaw niza u sakaj miz-r~…ĺan a r~…ĺu-to-wij-k…ô.s-bu-ar~…ĺ- ¶a ku kawaw. zikuz i r~…ĺow-ma,pow-r~…ĺuŇč-na atu wij-ni-s misakakawwa ¶iniza, i ba-r~…ĺan-sow-wa ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan u pab…ôr~…ĺiaj ¶inizaan a ba-kow a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an mauzip tu sazikuzaj tu a nikauzip a mińß ¶aan. ta-w…ôn-si i kasumamadan atu ajzaaj u aŇčaŇčan u mikur~…ĺitaj ńßan a paŇčaŇčan, u nikur~…ĺitan nisur~…ĺitan niza a kasiŇčaŇčan, "moŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa" tada u siŇčaŇčanaj u ńßina matuduŇčaj tu nikur~…ĺita a tad…ômaw. "sazikuzaja nikar~…ĺabi" nasa ńßamin nu kasa mińß ¶aanaj u sajadańßaj nir~…ĺijawan a mituduŇč mikur~…ĺit tu nu kiwkaj, ujza dada Ē~ ° ni mi-kaj-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶i-r~…ĺow "misaŇča Ē~ ° tu j…ô-taŇč" a siŇčaŇčan tan…ôŇč tu sar~…ĺuŇčan. r~…ĺi-aw-na-to a nikur~…ĺitan "wij-t…ô-r~…ĺu-wij a tad…ômaw" nasa ¶a mańßiza u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, namapatuduŇč i ¶ana ¶anan a tuudadn, mańßizaaj u ow a kar~…ĺisiw sapasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad atu ziku ¶an. u nikur~…ĺitan niza izaw ku ** a tatip…ôr~…ĺukan ku masub…ôr~…ĺidaj, sikasa ¶aaj ka jadańß, zajńßan sa r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa ¶iniza ¶aaj ka putut, tatur~…ĺtur~…ĺtur~…ĺ sa mijuŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a nar~…ĺimaan a tin…ôŇč tu sat…ôbu ¶ atu mikur~…ĺit ¶iniza ¶aaj kadadawa. anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a, u nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza a tuud, ujza pasu tu kar~…ĺamkam tu nisur~…ĺitan niza, k…ô-s…ô ba ¶u a pipańß…ô ¶i atu pakajniaj nisaba ¶uan tu nu r~…ĺimaaj a nisur~…ĺitan niza, mar~…ĺa u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a zidajan ujza dada Ē~ ° ¶i mi-kaj-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶i-r~…ĺow kja tan…ôŇč a patańßkar~…ĺ a u tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan, saakaj ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ a ku ¶uŇčaj a tabaki ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu ku ¶uŇčaj.
S.FORM: Li-aow-na-tow.Ta-wen-si (Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Leonardo da Vinci,śĄŹÁāļ" (Leonardo di ser Piero da Vinci, "), ci Li-aw-na-to.Ta-wen-si "I-tali- a kamu" Leonardo da Vinci imi uyni "Wen-si-cen a Li-aw-na-to, ci Zu-lye-li i 1451 a micaan 4 a bilad 15 a demiad katukuh 1519 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 2 ademiad", ci Ta-ben-ci han aca, hamin u ngangan ci Li-aw-na-to.Ti.Say-al.Pi-ye-low.Ta-en-si han "Leonardo di ser Piero da Vinci, uimi niza "Wen-si-cen-pi-ye-low u wawa niza ci Li-aw-na-to", I-tali nu nalimaan misulitay tu cudad u cumelakay a mihcaan Bow-low-lun-s masakaputay mapulungan a kanatal nu mitesekay ku tineng, i pikulit, dadiw misangay, miasipay, pinaay, micici'ay, migingkiway tu mauzipay, aadupan, mulangaway, migingkiw tu tahakay, migingkiw tu demiad, migingkiw tu lala'ay migikiway tu hekalay kakitizaan, migingkiw tu tahak, migikiway tu likat, migingkiway tu icelang, misabaluhay misanga', misangaay patizengay a kawaw hatini kayadah, u liwliw nu pienengan mahapinang amin ku mapahezekay a nisanga'an. ". ciniza mala u cumelakay nu nalimaan a misulitay tu cudad nu situngusay misitay tu lalangawan, i laylay u singanganay nu kucungay, aci Mi-kay-lang-ci-low atu ci La-piy-al malecad singanga ttu tulu nu matinengay cumelak nu nalimaan a misulitan. adidi'ay niyula a bunac 3000 u pikineng ci Ta-wen-sian a nipangangan han "ci Li-aw-na-to" śĆČÁÖßŤóĚŤ°ďŚŹ≤Ś≠łŤÄÖśĶ∑ŚÄę¬∑Śä†Śĺ∑Áīć(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Helen Gardner )ÁöĄŤ™™ś≥ē, . duduc tu nalimaan migingkiway tu laylay ci Hay-lun.Cya-te-na "kamu nu A-me-lika, Helen Gardner " han. tu kamu, u nabalucu'an niza katukuh tu i cayay ka izaway a liwliw atu katesek ka kailabu, saca "u nizateng niza atu tademaw mzahiza u malakuitaytu nu tademawan, ciniza u kaliyuhan u cayay ku cacapian aca. Marco Rosci patahkal kanahatu ayza yadah tu pakayniay ci Li-aw-na-to.Ta-wen-si a pizayeng, u piazih niza tu kitakit tatenga' maka nuyaanay a tineng tatungus tu nizatengan caay ku kakaliyuhan, micukaymas ciniza tu natenengan a misakaku tu nanimaan a kawaw itawya a mihcaan u micidekay tu. Ta-wen-si u kumuing ci Se-pi-ye-low.Ta-wen-si atu malukay a tatayna ci Ka-te-lin-na caay ka siacawa sibucud tu tatayna a wawaan, ciniza i I-ta-li-bow-low-lun-s-ancavay Wen-si a kaakitizaan lecuhan balaki. ci Li-aw-na-to naadidi' i singanganay tu Bow-low-lun-s nu mitesekay nu mikuliay ci An-te-lye.Te-al.Wilow-ci-aw a pikulitan amipalangaw. u saayawaya nikauzip a kawaw niza u sakay Miz-lan a Lu-to-wiy-ke.S-bu-al-ca ku kawaw. zikuz i Low-ma,Pow-lung-na atu Wiy-ni-s misakakawwa ciniza, i Ba-lan-sow-wa cacay a lasubu a mihcaan u pabeliay cinizaan a Ba-kow a luma'an mauzip tu sazikuzay tu a nikauzip a mihcaan. Ta-wen-si i kasumamadan atu ayzaay u angangan u mikulitay han a pangangan, u nikulitan nisulitan niza a kasingangan, "Mong-na-li-sa" tada u singanganay u hina matudungay tu nikulita a tademaw. "sazikuzaya nikalabi" nasa hamin nu kasa mihcaanay u sayadahay niliyawan a mitudung mikulit tu nu kiwkay, uyza dada' ni Mi-kay-lang-ci-low "misanga' tu Ye-tang" a singangan taneng tu salungan. Li-aw-na-to a nikulitan "Wiy-te-lu-wiy a tademaw" nasaca mahiza u lalangawan, namapatudung i canacanan a tuudadn, mahizaay u Ow a kalisiw sapasubana' tu cudad atu zikucan. u nikulitan niza izaw ku 15 a tatipelukan ku masubeliday, sikasa caay ka yadah, zayhan sa lalid sa ciniza caay ka putut, tatultultul sa miyung tu baluhay a nalimaan a tineng tu satebuc atu mikulit ciniza caay kadadawa. anu mahicahica, u nisanga'an niza a tuud, uyza pasu tu kalamkam tu nisulitan niza, ke-sey bacu a pipaheci atu pakayniay nisabacuan tu nu limaay a nisulitan niza, mala u malecaday a zidayan uyza dada' ci Mi-kay-lang-ci-low kya taneng a patahkal a u tatengilan, saakay iluciluc a kucungay a tabaki ku nikalilid tu kucungay.

". ¶iniza mar~…ĺa u ¶um…ôr~…ĺakaj nu nar~…ĺimaan a misur~…ĺitaj tu ¶udad nu situŇčusaj misitaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, i r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj u siŇčaŇčanaj nu ku ¶uŇčaj, a ¶i mi-kaj-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶i-r~…ĺow atu ¶i r~…ĺa-pij-ar~…ĺ mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad siŇčaŇča ttu tur~…ĺu nu matin…ôŇčaj ¶um…ôr~…ĺak nu nar~…ĺimaan a misur~…ĺitan. adidi Ē~ °aj nijur~…ĺa a buna ¶ **** u pikin…ôŇč ¶i ta-w…ôn-sian a nipaŇčaŇčan ńßan " ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to" *************(**:ńß…ôr~…ĺ…ôn gardn…ôr )***, . dudu ¶ tu nar~…ĺimaan migiŇčkiwaj tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺun. ¶ja-t…ô-na "kamu nu a-m…ô-r~…ĺika, ńß…ôr~…ĺ…ôn gardn…ôr " ńßan. tu kamu, u nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an niza katukuńß tu i ¶ajaj ka izawaj a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw atu kat…ôs…ôk ka kair~…ĺabu, sa ¶a "u nizat…ôŇč niza atu tad…ômaw mzańßiza u mar~…ĺakuitajtu nu tad…ômawan, ¶iniza u kar~…ĺijuńßan u ¶ajaj ku ¶a ¶apian a ¶a. mar ¶o *os ¶i patańßkar~…ĺ kanańßatu ajza jadańß tu pakajniaj ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to.ta-w…ôn-si a pizaj…ôŇč, u piazińß niza tu kitakit tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° maka nujaanaj a tin…ôŇč tatuŇčus tu nizat…ôŇčan ¶aaj ku kakar~…ĺijuńßan, mi ¶ukajmas ¶iniza tu nat…ôn…ôŇčan a misakaku tu nanimaan a kawaw itawja a mińß ¶aan u mi ¶id…ôkaj tu. ta-w…ôn-si u kumuiŇč ¶i s…ô-pi-j…ô-r~…ĺow.ta-w…ôn-si atu mar~…ĺukaj a tatajna ¶i ka-t…ô-r~…ĺin-na ¶aaj ka sia ¶awa sibu ¶ud tu tatajna a wawaan, ¶iniza i i-ta-r~…ĺi-bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s-an ¶a*aj w…ôn-si a kaakitizaan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan bar~…ĺaki. ¶i r~…ĺi-aw-na-to naadidi Ē~ ° i siŇčaŇčanaj tu bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s nu mit…ôs…ôkaj nu mikur~…ĺiaj ¶i an-t…ô-r~…ĺj…ô.t…ô-ar~…ĺ.wir~…ĺow- ¶i-aw a pikur~…ĺitan amipar~…ĺaŇčaw. u saajawaja nikauzip a kawaw niza u sakaj miz-r~…ĺan a r~…ĺu-to-wij-k…ô.s-bu-ar~…ĺ- ¶a ku kawaw. zikuz i r~…ĺow-ma,pow-r~…ĺuŇč-na atu wij-ni-s misakakawwa ¶iniza, i ba-r~…ĺan-sow-wa ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan u pab…ôr~…ĺiaj ¶inizaan a ba-kow a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an mauzip tu sazikuzaj tu a nikauzip a mińß ¶aan. ta-w…ôn-si i kasumamadan atu ajzaaj u aŇčaŇčan u mikur~…ĺitaj ńßan a paŇčaŇčan, u nikur~…ĺitan nisur~…ĺitan niza a kasiŇčaŇčan, "moŇč-na-r~…ĺi-sa" tada u siŇčaŇčanaj u ńßina matuduŇčaj tu nikur~…ĺita a tad…ômaw. "sazikuzaja nikar~…ĺabi" nasa ńßamin nu kasa mińß ¶aanaj u sajadańßaj nir~…ĺijawan a mituduŇč mikur~…ĺit tu nu kiwkaj, ujza dada Ē~ ° ni mi-kaj-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶i-r~…ĺow "misaŇča Ē~ ° tu j…ô-taŇč" a siŇčaŇčan tan…ôŇč tu sar~…ĺuŇčan. r~…ĺi-aw-na-to a nikur~…ĺitan "wij-t…ô-r~…ĺu-wij a tad…ômaw" nasa ¶a mańßiza u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, namapatuduŇč i ¶ana ¶anan a tuudadn, mańßizaaj u ow a kar~…ĺisiw sapasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad atu ziku ¶an. u nikur~…ĺitan niza izaw ku ** a tatip…ôr~…ĺukan ku masub…ôr~…ĺidaj, sikasa ¶aaj ka jadańß, zajńßan sa r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa ¶iniza ¶aaj ka putut, tatur~…ĺtur~…ĺtur~…ĺ sa mijuŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a nar~…ĺimaan a tin…ôŇč tu sat…ôbu ¶ atu mikur~…ĺit ¶iniza ¶aaj kadadawa. anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a, u nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza a tuud, ujza pasu tu kar~…ĺamkam tu nisur~…ĺitan niza, k…ô-s…ô ba ¶u a pipańß…ô ¶i atu pakajniaj nisaba ¶uan tu nu r~…ĺimaaj a nisur~…ĺitan niza, mar~…ĺa u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a zidajan ujza dada Ē~ ° ¶i mi-kaj-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶i-r~…ĺow kja tan…ôŇč a patańßkar~…ĺ a u tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan, saakaj ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ a ku ¶uŇčaj a tabaki ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu ku ¶uŇčaj.
